Hard Worker

Also About Me

Fullstack Developer Engineer

I am a fullstack developer with multiple years experience. My concentration is web app and mobile app development with latest tech stack. Currently i have made an tree mapping monitoring with flutter, asset management monitoring with vuejs and flutter.
